title: Integration
summary: 9709 P2 integration — indefinite and definite integrals, areas, and trapezium rule with GeoGebra.
learningObjectives: Integrate standard functions including e^x and 1/x.
Evaluate definite integrals and find areas.

simpleExplanation.title: Reverse differentiation
simpleExplanation.summary: Integration finds the area under a curve. Definite integrals give numeric area; indefinite integrals need +c.
steps: Area below axis counts negative — split if needed.

sections.content: **P2 Integration** (2.5) bridges **P1** (1.8) and **P3** (3.5). Show **+c** for indefinite integrals — automatic mark loss if omitted.
